'''Putney''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male from [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], and was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in charge of the assault troops sent to seize the [[planetary repulsor]] activated on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] during the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]]. He planned to launch the assault at around local sunset, when the [[Human League]] troops would be at their most sleep deprived. Admiral [[Hortel Ossilege|Ossilege]] later ordered him to launch the assault early, due to the fact that a [[Human League]] assault boat had left in pursuit of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and it was believed this would leave only light resistance at the repulsor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}}
